name: Docker & Kubernetes Containerization
description: Learn to containerize microservices, manage local clusters, and configure automated horizontal scaling rules for high-traffic architectures.

name: TypeScript Enterprise Design Patterns
description: Deep dive into advanced generic typing, utility decorators, conditional mapping types, and clean architectural patterns for large-scale web codebases.

name: PostgreSQL Database Performance Tuning
description: Master index optimizations, query execution plan audits, connection pooling strategies, and structural normalization to clear system bottlenecks.

name: GraphQL API Federated Architecture
description: Build high-speed data graphs using schema stitching, context isolation, complex resolvers, and preventative depth-limiting query validation rules.

name: Cyber Security & Web Pen-Testing
description: Audit cross-site scripting risks, parameter tampering vulnerabilities, security token configurations, and establish secure modern validation guards.

name: Product Management for Software Lead Engineers
description: Bridge engineering and business strategies. Learn to write effective feature tracking metrics, prioritize sprint cards, and handle complex feature roadmaps.
